description_long: This object is a multi-building school complex set within a rectangular lot bordered by a paved road. The complex features several distinct structures, including a large, red-brick main building with a flat roof, multiple windows, and adjacent smaller buildings with both flat and gabled roofs. The grounds include green lawn areas, paved walkways, and a few scattered trees, providing open space between the buildings. There are visible garage doors, parking spaces, and what appears to be a fenced area, suggesting utility and service access. The buildings are primarily constructed from brick and concrete, with some sections featuring large windows and modern design elements. The overall layout is organized and functional, typical of an educational campus in an urban neighborhood.
description: A multi-building school complex with red-brick and concrete structures, green lawns, and paved walkways, set within a rectangular urban lot.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main red-brick building at the front, with adjacent smaller buildings and green spaces visible behind it.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side of the main building and the arrangement of the smaller buildings and lawns are more apparent, with parking and garage areas visible.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the complex, emphasizing the green-roofed building and the open spaces between the structures.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side, displaying the arrangement of the smaller buildings and the main building's side, with the road encircling the lot.
